Healthcare Uncharted · Rounds

Current Events & Takes

News, commentary, and guest perspectives on what’s happening in healthcare policy, technology, and clinical practice — less tutorial, more take.

Rounds is the current-events arm of Healthcare Uncharted. While the Learn section builds frameworks and deep dives, Rounds is where we respond to what’s happening now — policy shifts, industry moves, and the clinical and operational implications nobody explains clearly. Guest authors welcome.

First rounds drop soon.

Our first guest Rounds posts from Chrysalis Ashton are on deck. Check back shortly — or explore the Learn section in the meantime.

A living resource for clinical informatics, healthcare data architecture, and the real story behind the systems that run modern medicine.

Built by David Eitel, RRT, MHA, MSRT, RRT-ACCS

Source Policy
All vendor-specific terminology, technical specifications, and system references on this site are derived from publicly available documentation — including fhir.epic.com, fhir.cerner.com, HL7 FHIR R4, ONC HealthIT.gov, and HHS.gov. Each factual claim is linked to its source. This site does not reproduce proprietary materials, internal vendor training content, or licensed documentation.
